items.name: SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Hoodie Boxy Crop Cute
items.description:
[ SCORCH // LUMINA PINK HOODIE BOXY CROP CUTE ]
Elevate your aesthetic with the SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Hoodie Boxy Crop Cute. This premium cropped silhouette features a signature boxy-fit with a high-cut waist for the ultimate modern streetwear look. Crafted with a creamy lumina pink base and custom artistic detailing. Perfect for a clean, trendy, and cute urban vibe.

[ MATCHING SET ]
Designed to be worn as a full set! Pair this cute crop hoodie with our SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Sweatpants Loose for the complete elite Y2K aesthetic. Find the matching pants in our store!
https://www.roblox.com/id/catalog/104709959131074/SCORCH-Lumina-Pink-Y2K-Hoodie-Boxy
